sql_array: CREATE TABLE server_info (id INT, server_name VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO server_info (id, server_name) VALUES (1, repl_this_server());
UPDATE server_info SET server_name = repl_this_server() WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, server_name FROM server_info WHERE server_name = repl_this_server();
DELETE FROM server_info WHERE server_name = repl_this_server();
